name: OmniTools
description: An all-in-one collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks
compose:
name: slashnode-omnitools
services:
  app:
    image: iib0011/omni-tools:0.6.0
    container_name: omnitools
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8678:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
